name: sidebar
title: Sidebar
description: The Enjab dashboard sidebar: brand header showing the TOOL's own mark + name (pass `appName` + `appIcon`, the same glyph as your favicon), grouped nav with active state, and the account footer + 'an Enjab product' byline. Plugs straight into Enjab Auth: pass the getUser() result as `user` (it has name + email) plus a sign-out handler.
